raw.message: Just $10.99 gets you the thick crust, golden edges and cheesy corners of a perfect Detroit-Style Pizza! Mini Cup Pepperoni or Create-Your-Own 2-Top.

hook.summary: Rapidly swapping pizza toppings in a 3x3 grid.
hook.visual_action: A square Detroit-style pizza alternates its toppings between pepperoni and veggie slices in a rhythmic, flickering pattern.

scene_flow: Display of a full pepperoni Detroit-style pizza on a teal background.
Individual slices rapidly cycle between pepperoni and veggie toppings in a stop-motion style.
The pizza toppings settle back into a uniform pepperoni layout.
audience_proxy: Value-conscious fast food consumers looking for a quick and affordable dinner option.
